name: personal-os
description: AI Personal OS — Robin as Chief of Staff. A growing collection of skills from Bayram Annakov's 5-week course. Identity, knowledge, communications, research, and multi-agent skills land here as each workshop ships. Built on Engelbart's H-LAM/T framework and the agentskills.io open standard.

interface.shortDescription: Robin as your Chief of Staff — skills from Bayram Annakov's 5-week course.
interface.longDescription: A growing skill bundle from the AI Personal OS course. Ships /init-robin and /finish-robin (W1 identity), /atomize (W2 knowledge), and /give-robin-a-voice (W3 — two-way Telegram for your assistant). New skills land here as each workshop ships.
capabilities: Two-way Telegram voice for your assistant
interface.defaultPrompt: Run /init-robin to set Robin up from your AI history, /atomize to build your knowledge vault, or /give-robin-a-voice to text your assistant on Telegram.
